auditor: Cherry Bekaert LLP, Tysons Corner, Virginia

note1_organization.summary: HFH LLC is a Delaware LLC formed 9/12/2007, began operations 10/11/2007. Wholly owned subsidiary of Hilton Domestic Operating Company Inc. (Parent), indirectly held by Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. Franchisor of all Hilton brands in US, US territories, and Thailand (for contracts post 10/24/2007). Licenses IP from wholly-owned affiliate royalty-free.

revenue_recognition.primary_obligation: IP license granting right to access brand IP, reservations systems, and property management systems
revenue_recognition.recognition_method: Series of distinct services transferred over time; variable consideration (royalty fees) recognized as earned using time as measure of progress
revenue_recognition.variable_consideration: Franchise royalty fees — sales-based royalties recognized as hotel room sales occur
revenue_recognition.fixed_consideration: Application/initiation fees allocated to performance obligations based on estimated standalone selling prices, recognized over contract term
revenue_recognition.franchise_royalty_fees: Percentage of monthly gross room revenue (and in some cases food/beverage/other). Billed/collected monthly. Incentive payments amortized over contract life as reduction to royalty fees.
revenue_recognition.franchise_sales_coo_fees: Fixed upfront fees, recognized over franchise contract term. Not considered significant financing component.
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized when payment received, as no further service provided and collection uncertain.

accounts_receivable_financing_receivable.ar: Primarily amounts due from hotel owners with franchise contracts
accounts_receivable_financing_receivable.financing: Loans to certain franchised hotel owners
accounts_receivable_financing_receivable.allowance_method: Expected credit losses based on historical collection, nature of instrument, current and forecasted business conditions

franchise_contracts.capitalization: Contract acquisition costs (incentives to hotel owners) and other incremental costs to obtain contracts capitalized as franchise contracts on balance sheet
franchise_contracts.amortization_method: Straight-line over estimated useful lives (contract term, generally including extension periods at franchisor's sole option)
franchise_contracts.amortization_start: Opening date of hotel or contract execution date, whichever is later
franchise_contracts.impairment_policy: Evaluate for indicators of impairment; if indicators exist, compare expected undiscounted future cash flows to net carrying value. If not recoverable and exceeds fair value, recognize impairment loss allocated pro rata.

franchise_deposits.treatment: Collected at application, recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues

contract_liabilities.treatment: Non-refundable advance consideration recognized over contract term. Presented as deferred revenues.

fair_value.hierarchy: Three-level (Level 1: quoted prices, Level 2: observable inputs, Level 3: unobservable inputs)
fair_value.election: Fair value measurement option NOT elected for any financial assets or liabilities

acquisitions_policy.business_combination_test: Assess inputs, processes, outputs. If fair value concentrated in single asset/group, treated as asset acquisition.
acquisitions_policy.asset_acquisition: Cost (including direct/incremental transaction costs) allocated to assets/liabilities based on relative fair values. No goodwill recognized.

note3_acquisition.summary: In May 2024, completed acquisition of Graduate franchise contracts as part of larger Hilton acquisition of Graduate brand. Accounted as asset acquisition. Recorded ~$85M franchise contract intangible. 15-year estimated useful life. Not material impact on 2024 operating results.

note5_fair_value.summary: Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated to equal carrying values as of 12/31/2024 and 12/31/2023.

note6_income_taxes.us_tax_status: Disregarded entity — all taxable income included in Hilton's computation
note6_income_taxes.foreign_taxes: Certain US territories require taxation of franchise licensing payments to foreign-domiciled entities (includes US). Rates vary by jurisdiction. Franchisee responsible for withholding and remittance.

note7_commitments_contingencies.debt_guarantee: Unconditionally and irrevocably guarantees certain Hilton debt obligations maturing 2025-2033. All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral. No guarantee liability recorded due to parent-subsidiary relationship.
note7_commitments_contingencies.litigation: Involved in various claims and lawsuits arising in ordinary course. Ultimate resolution not expected to have material adverse effect.

note8_related_party.intercompany_balances: Maintained with Hilton affiliates via centralized cash management (not controlled by HFH). Franchise deposits collected by affiliates, deposited in lockbox.
note8_related_party.settlements_2024: $1.5B of other receivables settled with simultaneous $1.5B distribution of retained earnings to Parent
note8_related_party.graduate_financing: Short-term intercompany note for $85M Graduate acquisition, settled February 2024 with accrued interest
note8_related_party.operator_agreement: Agreement with Hilton affiliate; no compensation paid 2022-2024

items_not_present.depreciation: No PP&E — entity is asset-light (franchise contracts only)
items_not_present.lease_accounting: No operating or finance leases disclosed
items_not_present.advertising_fund: Not separately accounted — Program Fee is franchisor revenue, not a trust fund
